Interface PurchaseManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
JDBCPurchaseManager
public interface PurchaseManager
Interface defining operations for managing purchases.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Purchase>
    getAllPurchases()
    Retrieves all purchases in the system.
    boolean
    savePurchase(Purchase purchase)
    Saves a medicine purchase in the database.
    boolean
    sellMedication(Purchase purchase)
    Registers the sale of a medicine.

  • Method Details

    • savePurchase

      boolean savePurchase(Purchase purchase)
      Saves a medicine purchase in the database.
      Parameters:
      purchase - the purchase object to save
      Returns:
      true if the purchase was successfully saved, false otherwise

    • sellMedication

      boolean sellMedication(Purchase purchase)
      Registers the sale of a medicine. The stock is reduced from the inventory and the purchase is registered.
      Parameters:
      purchase - the purchase object representing the sale
      Returns:
      true if the sale was successfully registered, false otherwise

    • getAllPurchases

      List<Purchase> getAllPurchases()
      Retrieves all purchases in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of all purchases
